long_description:
[COM]-compute-agent pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge:node:dal1-qz6-sr3-rk106-s30

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge' and kube_pod_name = 'kube-proxy-6lrqc'

Time:             12/04/2025 11:18 AM UTC
